violations.text: Establishment did not have a person onsite that has completed an approved food safety manager course during time of inspection. Establishment must have a food safety manager onsite at all times when time/temperature control for safety foods are being prepared. Establishment must enroll additional employees in an approved food safety manager course. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 05/07/2025

Establishment did not have a person onsite that has completed an approved food safety manager course during time of inspection. Establishment must have a food safety manager onsite at all times when time/temperature control for safety foods are being prepared. Establishment must enroll additional employees in an approved food safety manager course. New Violation. Correct By: 05/07/2025
Gloves were observed in the hand-washing sink. A hand-washing sink must not be used for purposes other than hand washing. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/23/2025

Homemade tartar sauce was observed not marked with the date of preparation. Ready-to-eat time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods prepared in the establishment and held for more than 24 hours must be marked with the date of preparation. New Violation. Correct By: 04/23/2025

Food packaged in the food establishment are lacking label information (major allergens and potentially secondary ingredients). Food packaged in a food establishment must be labeled with the common name of the food, a list of ingredients, major allergens and the quantity of the contents, and the business name/address. New Violation. Correct By: 05/07/2025

The ice machine is lacking an air gap. A direct connection must not exist between the sewage system and a drain originating from equipment in which food is placed. New Violation. Correct By: 05/07/2025

Establishment sells unlabeled frozen reduced oxygen packaged fish (swordfish, Arcadian redfish, haddock, cod, monk fish, and cod). Per person in charge, establishment does not vacuum package the fish in their establishment and has hired another company to do it. Per person in charge, establishment brings their own raw, unfrozen fish to the company where they vacuum package and freeze it for them and then it gets picked up and sold in their establishment. Fish was embargoed during time of inspection and must not be sold until an approval is given. New Violation. Correct By: 01/10/2024

Chlorine sanitizer solution was observed in excess of 200 parts per million (ppm). A chlorine sanitizer solution applied to food contact surfaces must be between 50-100 ppm. Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 01/10/2024

Fish stock, chopped sea clams, cooked conch meat, tuna, cod, monk fish, swordfish, redfish, and haddock packaged in the food establishment are lacking labels. Food packaged in a food establishment must be labeled with the common name of the food, a list of ingredients, the quantity of the contents, and the business name/address. Food was removed from shelves during time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/10/2024

Establishment sells unlabeled frozen reduced oxygen packaged fish (swordfish, Arcadian redfish, haddock, cod, monk fish, and cod). Per person in charge, establishment does not vacuum package the fish in their establishment and has hired another company to do it. Per person in charge, establishment brings their own raw, unfrozen fish to the company where they vacuum package and freeze it for them and then it gets picked up and sold in their establishment. Fish was voluntarily disposed of (see attached disposal form). Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 01/10/2024
